name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Types *)
Fork == 1..N
Philosopher == 1..N
State == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Helper functions *)
LeftFork == [p \in Philosopher |-> p]
RightFork == [p \in Philosopher |-> IF p = N THEN 1 ELSE p + 1]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [f \in Fork |-> 0]
        /\ states = [p \in Philosopher |-> "thinking"]

(* Next state *)
Next == \/ (* Philosopher p becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E p \in Philosopher : states[p] = "thinking" /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher p picks up forks if hungry and forks are free *)
          /\ \E p \in Philosopher : states[p] = "hungry" /\ forks[LeftFork[p]] = 0 /\ forks[RightFork[p]] = 0
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork[p]] = p, ![RightFork[p]] = p]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher p puts down forks if eating *)
          /\ \E p \in Philosopher : states[p] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork[p]] = 0, ![RightFork[p]] = 0]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [Fork -> 0..N]
          /\ states \in [Philosopher -> State]
          /\ \A p \in Philosopher : forks[LeftFork[p]] = 0 \/ forks[LeftFork[p]] = p
          /\ \A p \in Philosopher : forks[RightFork[p]] = 0 \/ forks[RightFork[p]] = p

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ count < K
      /\ head' = head
         /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
         /\ count' = count + 1
         /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ count > 0
      /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
         /\ tail' = tail
         /\ count' = count - 1
         /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ r \in readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>
